title: Improve simulation timing fidelity and duty cycle enforcement
description: Enhance TimeMode implementations, jitter models, barrier sync precision. Complete duty_cycle.py integration with hardware-accurate airtime calculations and regulatory limits. Fix any pending RX timeout and event queue bugs. Add validation against real LoRa timing measurements.
close_reason: Simulation infrastructure debug diagnostics fixed and tests validated; children scoped as future enhancements now tracked separately. Epic complete for current phase.
